component.name: Status pill
component.description: Rounded pill for job lifecycle and similar states. Typography/LABEL; padding Spacing/12 × Spacing/4; stroke 1px. Fills and strokes are bound to semantic status color variables in Figma (see `tokens.colors`). Embedded in **Job Card** (`622:161`) header in the Field Book file.

variants.notStarted: Neutral: **10%** tint fill + **Semantic/Status/Neutral/Text** stroke and label (flattened BG in `colors.json`).
variants.inProgress: Info: **10%** blue tint **Semantic/Status/Info/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Info/Text** stroke and label.
variants.completed: Warning: **Semantic/Status/Warning/BG**, stroke **Semantic/Status/Warning/Stroke** at **50%** paint opacity, label **Semantic/Status/Warning/Label** (amber `#92400E`).
variants.onHold: Paused: **10%** purple tint **Semantic/Status/Paused/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Paused/Text** stroke and label.
